economic_notes: Xaxli'p Development Corporation (wholly-owned business entity) accounted for by modified equity method. Total revenue and expenses of $2,321,410 each. Xaxli'p Development Corporation paid management fees of $580,318 to Xaxli'p. Consolidated subsidiaries include Tmicw Land Holdings Ltd., Xaxli'p Community Forest Corporation, and Fountain Valley Services Society.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Tmicw Land Holdings Ltd., Xaxli'p Community Forest Corporation, Fountain Valley Services Society. One GBE (Xaxli'p Development Corporation) accounted for by modified equity method. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Infrastructure expenses estimated as Public Works ($318,355) + Ministry of Transportation and Infrastructure Slide Stabilization Project ($340,137) = $658,492. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($4,547,406) + CMHC ($1,733,265) + First Nations Health Authority ($1,281,405) + Province of BC ($1,040,581) + FNESC ($119,309) + ASETS ($70,876) + St'at'imc Trust ($483,898) + BC First Nation Gaming ($228,309 approximation excluded - Gaming revenue treated as own source) — recalculated: ISC+CMHC+FNHA+BC+FNESC+ASETS+St'at'imc Trust = 4547406+1733265+1281405+1040581+119309+70876+483898 = 9276740; OSR = 11273484-9276740 = 1996744. Budget information was not prepared for the full scope of activities. Deferred revenue of $684,391 relates to ISC and other government deferred funding. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $144,626; operating reserve underfunded by $358,701.
